name: Fried Bruschetta
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black k pepper
recipeInstructions: Heat some olive oil in a skillet. Fry the bread with the garlic until it is golden brown. Spread the fried bread with puréed beans, season with salt and pepper, drizzle more olive oil on top, and garnish with chopped fresh fennel or roasted red peppers. Serve 2 servings.
